# Elli Session Targets
*Auto-generated — do not edit manually*
*Updated: 2026-05-15T22:51:15.667Z*

• Try a fun game where I give you directions with two or three steps, like "stand up, turn around, then sit down"

• Listen carefully when you say words—sometimes you mix up "nearly" and "neatly"—let's play with those sound-alike words

• Ask you to say sentences back to me after I say them, like a memory game

• Watch how you spell words on paper vs. when we play Monster Stampede—sometimes games feel easier than writing
